description_long: This object is a spherical vending machine with a striking, deep purple and black coloration, featuring a subtle grid pattern and scattered points of light reminiscent of a cosmic or galactic theme. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with no visible seams, doors, or mechanical components, giving it a highly modern and abstract appearance. There are no discernible display panels, payment interfaces, or product retrieval slots visible on any side. The coloration is consistent throughout, with some areas showing brighter purple nebula-like clouds and others remaining almost entirely black. The object is perfectly round, lacking any flat surfaces or protrusions, which is atypical for traditional vending machines. Its design suggests a futuristic or conceptual approach, possibly intended as an art installation or a highly stylized amenity in an urban environment.
description: A glossy, spherical vending machine with a cosmic purple and black color scheme, featuring a grid pattern and scattered light points, with no visible interactive components.
description_view_0: This view shows the vending machine as a nearly solid black sphere with faint purple highlights and minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: Here, the grid pattern and purple nebula-like cloud are more prominent, with scattered light points visible across the surface.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the brightest area of the purple cloud and the most distinct grid pattern, giving the sphere a more dynamic appearance.
description_view_3: This view displays a mix of dark and purple areas, with the grid pattern and scattered light points visible but less pronounced than in view 2.
